Appearances:
Plaintiff Victor G. Makras.
Attorney John Zanghi appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Elmer Adonay Solis is present.
Attorney Supriya Molina Wunsh representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Steve Collier, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of MAY-06-2013 is vacated. (501/JPT)
